description: XD-2 §8 scenario 1: user hits Esc mid-stream. Client emits turn.cancel; server stops token emission; any 'pending' itinerary patches issued during this turn must be rolled back. Assistant's final visible state should match the 'Stopped' copy template.

messages.content: Plan me a 5-day Tokyo trip in October for two travelers, hotel near Shinjuku, business class flights from SFO.
